name: playwright
description: Playwright — End-to-End-Testing & Browser-Automation: Test-Runner (@playwright/test), Library-API (Browser/Context/Page/Locator/Network/…), komplette API-Referenz aller Klassen, Assertions, Fixtures, Reporter, Parallelität, Trace Viewer, Codegen, CI/Docker, Emulation, Auth, Accessibility, Komponenten-Tests, Migration (Puppeteer/Selenium/Protractor), Playwright MCP & Agent-CLI.
